title: Tick 21: flip D6 done after outcomes pull 12 merged and prove ci-firefighter subagent runnable by re-dispatching on outcomes pull 3
question: Does the QUEUE row D6 flip from in_progress to done now that opensubagents outcomes pull 12 has merged and does the ci-firefighter subagent demonstrate correct dedup behavior when re-dispatched against the long-standing red outcomes pull 3 by classifying the failure observing the prior triage comment and posting no duplicate?
success_criteria: QUEUE row D6 flipped in_progress to done with the merged opensubagents outcomes pull 12 URL preserved as the runroc
ci-firefighter subagent re-dispatched against outcomes pull 3 via the Agent tool and classified the failure as outcome-gate the same as the prior triage from tick 3
the subagent honored the no-duplicate rule by detecting the prior alex-jadecli ci-firefighter comment and skipping a new post
runroc outcomes runrocs E2-ci-firefighter json records the prior comment body author and URL so future ticks can verify the subagent has already triaged this PR

capabilities: D6 row flipped done after outcomes pull 12 merge
ci-firefighter subagent classifies outcome-gate failures correctly
subagent dedup behavior verified by observing skip on unchanged failure
runroc captures the prior triage comment that the subagent observed
